suppressedMessages.message: The 'clearQuestionFlow' function makes the dependencies of useCallback Hook (at line 1313) change on every render. To fix this, wrap the definition of 'clearQuestionFlow' in its own useCallback() Hook.

suppressions.justification: 该函数只重置本地问题流状态，依赖为空且由 ref 保证当前值同步

messages.message: Unused eslint-disable directive (no problems were reported from 'react-hooks/exhaustive-deps').

suppressedMessages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

suppressions.justification: API 边界层需要动态解析 JSON 结构
